entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: SHEATH ROT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting rice plants.

entities.name: HORIZONTAL RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic resistance to sheath rot that is polygenic and stable across environments.

entities.name: NORTH CAROLINA DESIGN II
entities.description: A mating design used to estimate general and specific combining ability.

entities.name: GCA AND SCA
entities.description: General and Specific Combining Ability analysis used to determine gene action.

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles at a locus contributing to a trait.

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: Genetic effects including dominance and epistasis.

entities.name: HERITABILITY ESTIMATES
entities.description: Statistical measures used to determine the proportion of phenotypic variance due to genetic variance.

entities.name: DOMINANT GENES
entities.description: Genes that mask the expression of recessive alleles.

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes whose effects are masked by dominant alleles.

entities.name: CYICARO
entities.description: A rice genotype identified as a promising source of resistance to sheath rot.

entities.name: YUNERTIAN
entities.description: A rice genotype identified as a promising source of resistance to sheath rot.

entities.name: YUNKENG
entities.description: A rice genotype identified as a promising source of resistance to sheath rot.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material from one hybrid species back to another.

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to increase the frequency of desirable alleles.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC SELECTION
entities.description: Selection based on the observable characteristics of the organism.
